arts.ttl: Liverpool receive transfer boost as journalist confirms target is ready to move
arts.sum: Liverpool were strongly linked with a move for Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi. The Spaniard came close to joining the Premier League giants as Arne Slot was looking for a new number 6 to become a part of his midfield. arts.ttl: Liverpool and Arsenal appear to have balked at €60m request for midfielder – Contact made then quick retreat
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal have considered signing Atalanta’s Éderson, with interest from the two clubs covered in Italy again today. The midfielder was one of the standout players for La Dea last season, when they won the Europa League by beating Bayer Leverkusen in the final. arts.sum: Van Dijk remains a player of key importance for Liverpool, but the defender's future is uncertain, with his contract set to expire at the end of June.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah bidding to equal Daniel Sturridge Liverpool record in Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah could equal a Reds record set by Daniel Sturridge when Arne Slot's side take on Everton in Saturday's Premier League Merseyside derby.
